## 1. Phase 16: Session-Tracker Tool Intelligence + Event-Tracker Deprecation Cleanup

### What Was Built/Delivered

| Artifact | File | LOC | Purpose |
|----------|------|-----|---------|
| Schema extensions | `src/schema-kernel/session-tracker.schema.ts` | 141+ | Added `filter-sessions`, `aggregate`, `get-manifest` discriminated union variants |
| New schema file | `src/schema-kernel/session-view.schema.ts` | 37 | Input schema for new `hivemind-session-view` tool |
| Enhanced session-tracker | `src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts` | 334 | Added child .json search, `filter-sessions` action, removed 50KB silent skip |
| Enhanced session-context | `src/tools/hivemind/session-context.ts` | 217 | Added `aggregate` action (status/subagentType histogram) |
| Enhanced session-hierarchy | `src/tools/hivemind/session-hierarchy.ts` | 159 | Added `get-manifest` action (reads hierarchy-manifest.json) |
| **New:** hivemind-session-view | `src/tools/hivemind/hivemind-session-view.ts` | 124 | **New tool** — cross-root unified query (3 roots via Promise.all) |
| Plugin registration | `src/plugin.ts` | Updated | Registered new tool (22→23 tools), updated startup message |
| Event-tracker cleanup | `.hivefiver-meta-builder/skills-lab/` (2 skill files) | Updated | 7 event-tracker references annotated with deprecation markers |
| Skill rewrite | `.hivefiver-meta-builder/skills-lab/hivemind-power-on/` (7 files) | 236+6 refs | Full rewrite removing aspirational content, truthful resume guidance |

### Session Tracker Tool Interface Signatures (Complete)

**`session-tracker`** — `src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts`
```
Actions: export-session, get-status, get-summary, list-sessions, search-sessions, filter-sessions

search-sessions(query, limit?, format?):
  → Queries child .json files (lastMessage, turn.content, journey[].content, delegatedBy.subagentType)
  → Removed MAX_SEARCH_CHUNK_BYTES (50KB skip), added >1MB warnings
  → Returns { totalMatches, sessions, hasMore, fileWarnings }

filter-sessions(status?, agentType?, minDepth?, maxDepth?, timeRange?, limit?):
  → Phase 1: Index-level filter via project-continuity.json (fast path)
  → Phase 2: Depth/agentType filter via individual session-continuity.json
  → Returns { totalCandidates, results[{sessionId, agentType, depth, status, lastMessage[:500], createdAt, updatedAt, toolSummary, childCount}], hasMore, filters }
```

**`session-hierarchy`** — `src/tools/hivemind/session-hierarchy.ts`
```
Actions: get-children, get-parent-chain, get-delegation-depth, get-manifest

get-manifest(sessionId):
  → Reads hierarchy-manifest.json via safeSessionPath
  → Returns { sessionId, childCount, children[{childSessionId, status, delegatedBy, depth, turnCount, createdAt}] }
```

**`session-context`** — `src/tools/hivemind/session-context.ts`
```
Actions: find-related, cross-reference, synthesize-context, aggregate

aggregate(groupBy: "subagentType" | "status"):
  → Status: fast path via project-continuity.json index
  → SubagentType: slow path via individual continuity files (sessionID prefix heuristic)
  → Returns { groupBy, totalSessions, counts, timestamp }
```

**`hivemind-session-view`** *(NEW)* — `src/tools/hivemind/hivemind-session-view.ts`
```
Actions: get

get(sessionId):
  → Read-through merge: Promise.all over 3 roots concurrently
  → Reads: session-tracker/{sessionId}/session-continuity.json + .hivemind/state/delegations.json + trajectory-ledger.json
  → Returns { session: {sessionId, status, turnCount, childCount, delegationDepth, parentSessionID, lastUpdated, toolSummary}, delegations: {total, active, entries}, trajectory: {total, entries} | null, queriedAt }
  → Per-root graceful fallback: null/[] on corrupt/missing files
```

### CQRS Boundaries Identified

| Principle | Implementation |
|-----------|---------------|
| **Tools = write-side (mutation)** | `delegate-task`, `delegation-status` handle mutations |
| **Tools = read-side (new actions)** | `filter-sessions`, `aggregate`, `get-manifest`, `hivemind-session-view` are **pure reads** — no mutation |
| **Hooks = read-side** | Existing convention verified: hooks must not write durable state (`cqrs-boundary.ts` enforces `assertHookWriteBoundary()`) |
| **No mutation in Phase 16 tools** | All new tools/actions are read-only — `hivemind-session-view` explicitly documented as "Read-only — no mutation authority" |
| **`hivemind-session-view` reads 3 roots** | Uses `safeSessionPath()` for `.hivemind/session-tracker/` (path traversal guard) and `resolve()` for `.hivemind/state/` files |

### Event-Tracker Deprecation

| Location | Status |
|----------|--------|
| `src/` (22 files) | Clean (CP-ST-03 excised all, confirmed by rg scan) |
| `.opencode/skills/hm-l3-hivemind-engine-contracts/SKILL.md` | ✅ Fixed — 2 refs replaced with "session tracker (event-tracker deprecated)" |
| `.opencode/skills/hm-l3-hivemind-state-reference/SKILL.md` | ✅ Fixed — 5 refs marked as "REMOVED in CP-ST-03" |
| `.opencode/skills/hivemind-power-on/SKILL.md` | Already clean (0 references) |
| `src/plugin.ts` migration code | **Left intact** — active migration logic performing one-shot `.hivemind/event-tracker/` cleanup |
| `.planning/` docs | **Left intact** — purely historical references documenting the excision |
| `src/*/AGENTS.md` comments | **Left intact** — historical documentation of what was removed |

**Methodology:** D-16 specified "Verify + docs update; do not modify test fixtures." The `evals.json` test fixture in `hm-l3-hivemind-state-reference/` was left untouched per this decision.

### Code Review Findings (3 CRITICAL)

From `16-REVIEW.md`:

| # | Finding | Severity | Description |
|---|---------|----------|-------------|
| CR-01 | Aggregation heuristic always returns "generic-session" | CRITICAL | `subagentType` grouping checks `sessionID.startsWith("hm-")` but session IDs are `"ses_"`-prefixed — collapses ALL sessions into one bucket |
| CR-02 | hivemind-session-view returns `success()` envelope when session not found | CRITICAL | Error key in payload body but `kind: "success"` wrapper — downstream consumers misled |
| CR-03 | `safeSessionPath` path-traversal guard broken on Windows | CRITICAL | `trackerRoot + "/"` check uses forward slash; on Windows, `path.resolve()` produces backslashes, bypassing guard |

Also 5 WARNING and 5 INFO findings (WR-01→WR-05, IN-01→IN-05).

## 2. Phase 17: Sync Boundary Definition + src/ Audit

### What Was Delivered

| Artifact | LOC | Purpose |
|----------|-----|---------|
| `17-FINDINGS.md` | 1,091 | Complete structured findings report: 60 findings (F-01→F-60) across 15 modules |
| `17-VALIDATION.md` | 101 | Nyquist-compliant validation strategy |
| `17-RESEARCH.md` | 640 | Pre-audit module inventory with known issues |
| `17-04-SUMMARY.md` | 143 | Final compilation with 12 recommended actions |

### Audit Methodology

4 plans, 4 waves, manual file-by-file per D-10:

| Plan | Modules Audited | Files | LOC | Findings |
|------|-----------------|-------|-----|----------|

| **Total** | **15 modules** | **227** | **~36,082** | **60 findings: 8 dead, 3 noise, 2 context-rot, 1 test-gap, 1 size-violation** |

### CQRS Boundary Audit

**Verified:** No CQRS violations found across all 15 modules. The `cqrs-boundary.ts` enforcement is effective. Hooks remain read-side only.

### Top 5 Critical Findings (by severity)

1. **F-38**: `src/task-management/recovery/` (5 files, 763 LOC) — **DEAD** — zero runtime consumers, superseded by delegation-level recovery
2. **F-49**: `src/features/steering-engine/` (3 files, 609 LOC) — **DEAD** — zero importers, replaced by session-tracker architecture
3. **F-60**: `src/harness/` vs `src/kernel/` — duplicate empty stubs (`.gitkeep` only)
4. **F-46**: `src/features/bootstrap/runtime-detection/` (2 files, 195 LOC) — **DEAD** — never wired
5. **F-23**: `src/hooks/transforms/toggle-gates.ts` (83 LOC) — **DEAD** — 0 external importers

|---------------------|--------|--------|
| Routing has "ZERO test coverage" | 9 dedicated test files exist | Incorrect gap flag — tests under `tests/lib/` paths |
| `compiler.ts` is "~500 LOC" | 410 LOC (well under 500 cap) | Overstated |
| session-tracker/index.ts is "1035 LOC" | 561 LOC (still over 500 cap) | Half of what was claimed |

| prompt sub-tools have "NO tests" | 4 test files exist (prompt-analyze, prompt-skim, session-patch) | Incorrect |

| command-delegation has "NO tests" | `tests/lib/command-delegation.test.ts` (732 lines) exists | Incorrect |

| Module | Source Files | Test Files | LOC | Evidence |
|--------|-------------|------------|-----|----------|
| `toggle-gates` | 1 | 1 | 186 | 0 external importers across src/ |
| `steering-engine/` | 3 | 0 | 609 | 0 importers; replaced by session-tracker |

### storeCache Extraction

**Created:** `src/task-management/continuity/store-cache.ts` (33 LOC)

```typescript
export function getStoreCache(): ContinuityStoreFile | undefined
export function setStoreCache(cache: ContinuityStoreFile): void
export function resetStoreCache(): void  // NEW — replaces vi.resetModules() hack
```

**Pattern:** Module-level singleton extracted from `continuity/index.ts` → dedicated module with explicit API. Uses `import type` from `../../shared/types.js` (not `./index.js`) to prevent circular dependency.

**Key correction found during execution:** `vi.resetModules()` could NOT be fully removed from `beforeEach`/`afterEach` in continuity.test.ts because `vi.doMock("node:fs", ...)` tests require module-level reset for mock isolation. Fixed by keeping both mechanisms — `resetStoreCache()` for cold-start simulation, `vi.resetModules()` for `vi.doMock` isolation.

### Barrel Narrowing

```diff
- export * from "./routing/command-engine/index.js"
+ export {
+   executeCommandEngineAction,
+   listCommands,
+   discoverCommandBundles,
+ } from "./routing/command-engine/index.js"
```

**4 functions removed from public API:** `analyzeCommandContract`, `renderCommandContext`, `transformCommandMessages`, `routeCommandPreview` — all internal routing helpers accessed through the dispatcher.

### Boundary Drift Assessment

**Current vs `last_mapped_commit`:** HEAD (`d0d5e966`) is 1 commit past `last_mapped_commit` (`906b21a0`). That single commit (`47e2717e`) already refreshed ALL 7 codebase maps. Post-cleanup manifest updates were documented as "real but small."

---

## 4. Cross-Phase Architecture Synthesis

### Tool Evolution Across All 3 Phases

```
Phase 16 (Build):                Phase 17 (Audit):          Phase 18 (Cleanup):
─────────────────────────────    ───────────────────────    ───────────────────────
session-tracker (+2 actions)     60 findings across        4 dead modules deleted
session-hierarchy (+1 action)     15 modules               storeCache extracted
session-context (+1 action)      7 RESEARCH.md fixes       barrel narrowed
hivemind-session-view (NEW)      No source changes         4 manifests synced
event-tracker remnants cleaned
hivemind-power-on skill rewritten
```

### Session Querying Data Flow (Complete)

```
Agent calls:
  └─ session-tracker({action: "search-sessions", query})
       └─ readdir → filter directories → read .md files
       └─ searchChildJsonFiles() → read session-continuity.json → iterate children → search 4 fields
       └─ Return matches with fileWarnings[] (if >1MB)

  └─ session-tracker({action: "filter-sessions", status, agentType, depth})
       └─ Phase 1: read project-continuity.json → index-level filter (fast)
       └─ Phase 2: read individual session-continuity.json → depth/agentType filter
       └─ Return rich metadata (up to limit, capped at 100)

  └─ session-context({action: "aggregate", groupBy})
       └─ status: read project-continuity.json only (fast path)
       └─ subagentType: read each session-continuity.json (slow path)

  └─ session-hierarchy({action: "get-manifest", sessionId})
       └─ safeSessionPath → readFile → JSON.parse(hierarchy-manifest.json)
       └─ Return flattened child list

  └─ hivemind-session-view({action: "get", sessionId})
       └─ Promise.all([
            readSessionData() → .hivemind/session-tracker/{id}/session-continuity.json
            readDelegationsForSession() → .hivemind/state/delegations.json
            readTrajectoryForSession() → .hivemind/state/trajectory-ledger.json
          ])
       └─ Merge into nested tree { session, delegations, trajectory }
```

### Notification/Communication Patterns

| Pattern | Where | Description |
|---------|-------|-------------|
| Tool action routing | All 5 tools | Single tool with `action` enum → `switch` → handler functions. Zod discriminatedUnion at schema boundary |
| Read-through merge | `hivemind-session-view` | `Promise.all` on 3 `readFile` calls, no materialized view |
| Index-first filtering | `filter-sessions` | Phase 1: read project-continuity.json index; Phase 2: read individual continuity files only on reduced candidate set |
| Per-root graceful fallback | `hivemind-session-view` | Null/empty fallback for each root independently — corrupt/missing files don't crash the whole query |
| In-memory cache (light) | `search-sessions` | Module-level `Map<string, { results, expiresAt }>` with TTL (agent's discretion, ~60s) |
| File size warning | `search-sessions` | >1MB files get `fileWarnings[]` instead of silent 50KB skip |
| Deprecation annotation | Skill files | "REMOVED in CP-ST-03" or "(event-tracker deprecated)" — preserves historical context while marking status |

### Sync Boundary Rules (established across Phases 17-18)

| Boundary | Rule | Source |
|----------|------|--------|
| **src/ = runtime code** | All implementation lives here | Phase 17 audit scope |
| **.opencode/ = soft meta-concepts** | Skills, agents, commands, rules — NOT state, NOT runtime code | Q6 + Phase 17 D-16 |
| **.hivemind/ = internal state root** | Session journals, lineage, continuity, delegation records | Q6 + Phase 16 D-10 |
| **.planning/ = governance only** | Requirements, architecture, audits — L5 docs only, no runtime authority | Planning AGENTS.md |
| **Sync manifest format** | Hybrid: JSON whitelist (sync-manifest.json) + .syncignore exclude patterns | Phase 17 D-15 |
| **Community repo receives** | Whitelisted dirs + `.github/workflows/` + cleaned src/ | Phase 17 D-17 |
| **.opencode/ packaged for distribution** | NOT synced as directory; primitives packaged via hivemind init CLI | Phase 17 D-16 |

### Key Code Paths

| Path | File | Role |
|------|------|------|
| `safeSessionPath()` | `src/features/session-tracker/persistence/atomic-write.ts` | Path traversal prevention for all session-tracker reads |
| `isValidSessionID()` | `src/features/session-tracker/types.ts` | Session ID format validation |
| `resolvePaths()` | `src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts` | Resolves .md and .json paths for search |
| `searchChildJsonFiles()` | `src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts` | JSON-aware 4-field search in child session files |
| `handleFilterSessions()` | `src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts` | Two-phase index-first filtering |
| `handleAggregate()` | `src/tools/hivemind/session-context.ts` | Cross-session aggregation with fast/slow paths |
| `handleGetManifest()` | `src/tools/hivemind/session-hierarchy.ts` | Reads hierarchy-manifest.json |
| `buildUnifiedView()` | `src/tools/hivemind/hivemind-session-view.ts` | Cross-root merge via Promise.all |
| `getStoreCache()` / `resetStoreCache()` | `src/task-management/continuity/store-cache.ts` | Extracted singleton cache with explicit API |
| `ensureStoreLoaded()` | `src/task-management/continuity/index.ts` | Uses store-cache.ts after Phase 18 extraction |

### Quality Metrics

| Metric | Phase 16 | Phase 17 | Phase 18 |
|--------|----------|----------|----------|
| Typecheck | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Tests passing | 418 session-tracker + existing | N/A (no source changes) | 2382/2384 passed |
| Review findings | 3 CRITICAL, 5 WARNING, 5 INFO | N/A (discovery phase) | 0 CRITICAL, 2 WARNING, 2 INFO |
| Gate verdict | — | ✅ Nyquist-compliant | ✅ Three gates clear |

---

**Total: 47 artifacts consumed, ~6,800 LOC of planning artifacts synthesized into this report.**

### Code Review Findings (3 CRITICAL)

| # | Finding | Severity | Description |
|---|---------|----------|-------------|

### storeCache Extraction

**Created:** `src/task-management/continuity/store-cache.ts` (33 LOC)

```typescript
export function getStoreCache(): ContinuityStoreFile | undefined
export function setStoreCache(cache: ContinuityStoreFile): void
export function resetStoreCache(): void  // NEW — replaces vi.resetModules() hack
```

**Pattern:** Module-level singleton extracted from `continuity/index.ts` → dedicated module with explicit API. Uses `import type` from `../../shared/types.js` (not `./index.js`) to prevent circular dependency.

**Key correction found during execution:** `vi.resetModules()` could NOT be fully removed from `beforeEach`/`afterEach` in continuity.test.ts because `vi.doMock("node:fs", ...)` tests require module-level reset for mock isolation. Fixed by keeping both mechanisms — `resetStoreCache()` for cold-start simulation, `vi.resetModules()` for `vi.doMock` isolation.

### Barrel Narrowing

```diff
- export * from "./routing/command-engine/index.js"
+ export {
+   executeCommandEngineAction,
+   listCommands,
+   discoverCommandBundles,
+ } from "./routing/command-engine/index.js"
```

**4 functions removed from public API:** `analyzeCommandContract`, `renderCommandContext`, `transformCommandMessages`, `routeCommandPreview` — all internal routing helpers accessed through the dispatcher.

### Boundary Drift Assessment

**Current vs `last_mapped_commit`:** HEAD (`d0d5e966`) is 1 commit past `last_mapped_commit` (`906b21a0`). That single commit (`47e2717e`) already refreshed ALL 7 codebase maps. Post-cleanup manifest updates were documented as "real but small."

---

## 4. Cross-Phase Architecture Synthesis

### Tool Evolution Across All 3 Phases

```
Phase 16 (Build):                Phase 17 (Audit):          Phase 18 (Cleanup):
─────────────────────────────    ───────────────────────    ───────────────────────
session-tracker (+2 actions)     60 findings across        4 dead modules deleted
session-hierarchy (+1 action)     15 modules               storeCache extracted
session-context (+1 action)      7 RESEARCH.md fixes       barrel narrowed
hivemind-session-view (NEW)      No source changes         4 manifests synced
event-tracker remnants cleaned
hivemind-power-on skill rewritten
```

### Session Querying Data Flow (Complete)

```
Agent calls:
  └─ session-tracker({action: "search-sessions", query})
       └─ readdir → filter directories → read .md files
       └─ searchChildJsonFiles() → read session-continuity.json → iterate children → search 4 fields
       └─ Return matches with fileWarnings[] (if >1MB)

  └─ session-tracker({action: "filter-sessions", status, agentType, depth})
       └─ Phase 1: read project-continuity.json → index-level filter (fast)
       └─ Phase 2: read individual session-continuity.json → depth/agentType filter
       └─ Return rich metadata (up to limit, capped at 100)

  └─ session-context({action: "aggregate", groupBy})
       └─ status: read project-continuity.json only (fast path)
       └─ subagentType: read each session-continuity.json (slow path)

  └─ session-hierarchy({action: "get-manifest", sessionId})
       └─ safeSessionPath → readFile → JSON.parse(hierarchy-manifest.json)
       └─ Return flattened child list

  └─ hivemind-session-view({action: "get", sessionId})
       └─ Promise.all([
            readSessionData() → .hivemind/session-tracker/{id}/session-continuity.json
            readDelegationsForSession() → .hivemind/state/delegations.json
            readTrajectoryForSession() → .hivemind/state/trajectory-ledger.json
          ])
       └─ Merge into nested tree { session, delegations, trajectory }
```

### Notification/Communication Patterns

| Pattern | Where | Description |
|---------|-------|-------------|
| Tool action routing | All 5 tools | Single tool with `action` enum → `switch` → handler functions. Zod discriminatedUnion at schema boundary |
| Read-through merge | `hivemind-session-view` | `Promise.all` on 3 `readFile` calls, no materialized view |
| Index-first filtering | `filter-sessions` | Phase 1: read project-continuity.json index; Phase 2: read individual continuity files only on reduced candidate set |
| Per-root graceful fallback | `hivemind-session-view` | Null/empty fallback for each root independently — corrupt/missing files don't crash the whole query |
| In-memory cache (light) | `search-sessions` | Module-level `Map<string, { results, expiresAt }>` with TTL (agent's discretion, ~60s) |
| File size warning | `search-sessions` | >1MB files get `fileWarnings[]` instead of silent 50KB skip |
| Deprecation annotation | Skill files | "REMOVED in CP-ST-03" or "(event-tracker deprecated)" — preserves historical context while marking status |

### Sync Boundary Rules (established across Phases 17-18)

| Boundary | Rule | Source |
|----------|------|--------|
| **src/ = runtime code** | All implementation lives here | Phase 17 audit scope |
| **.opencode/ = soft meta-concepts** | Skills, agents, commands, rules — NOT state, NOT runtime code | Q6 + Phase 17 D-16 |
| **.hivemind/ = internal state root** | Session journals, lineage, continuity, delegation records | Q6 + Phase 16 D-10 |
| **.planning/ = governance only** | Requirements, architecture, audits — L5 docs only, no runtime authority | Planning AGENTS.md |
| **Sync manifest format** | Hybrid: JSON whitelist (sync-manifest.json) + .syncignore exclude patterns | Phase 17 D-15 |
| **Community repo receives** | Whitelisted dirs + `.github/workflows/` + cleaned src/ | Phase 17 D-17 |
| **.opencode/ packaged for distribution** | NOT synced as directory; primitives packaged via hivemind init CLI | Phase 17 D-16 |

### Key Code Paths

| Path | File | Role |
|------|------|------|
| `safeSessionPath()` | `src/features/session-tracker/persistence/atomic-write.ts` | Path traversal prevention for all session-tracker reads |
| `isValidSessionID()` | `src/features/session-tracker/types.ts` | Session ID format validation |
| `resolvePaths()` | `src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts` | Resolves .md and .json paths for search |
| `searchChildJsonFiles()` | `src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts` | JSON-aware 4-field search in child session files |
| `handleFilterSessions()` | `src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts` | Two-phase index-first filtering |
| `handleAggregate()` | `src/tools/hivemind/session-context.ts` | Cross-session aggregation with fast/slow paths |
| `handleGetManifest()` | `src/tools/hivemind/session-hierarchy.ts` | Reads hierarchy-manifest.json |
| `buildUnifiedView()` | `src/tools/hivemind/hivemind-session-view.ts` | Cross-root merge via Promise.all |
| `getStoreCache()` / `resetStoreCache()` | `src/task-management/continuity/store-cache.ts` | Extracted singleton cache with explicit API |
| `ensureStoreLoaded()` | `src/task-management/continuity/index.ts` | Uses store-cache.ts after Phase 18 extraction |

### Quality Metrics

| Metric | Phase 16 | Phase 17 | Phase 18 |
|--------|----------|----------|----------|
| Typecheck | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Tests passing | 418 session-tracker + existing | N/A (no source changes) | 2382/2384 passed |
| Review findings | 3 CRITICAL, 5 WARNING, 5 INFO | N/A (discovery phase) | 0 CRITICAL, 2 WARNING, 2 INFO |
| Gate verdict | — | ✅ Nyquist-compliant | ✅ Three gates clear |

---

**Total: 47 artifacts consumed, ~6,800 LOC of planning artifacts synthesized into this report.**

## 1. Phase 16: Session-Tracker Tool Intelligence + Event-Tracker Deprecation Cleanup

### What Was Built/Delivered

| Artifact | File | LOC | Purpose |
|----------|------|-----|---------|
| Schema extensions | `src/schema-kernel/session-tracker.schema.ts` | 141+ | Added `filter-sessions`, `aggregate`, `get-manifest` discriminated union variants |
| New schema file | `src/schema-kernel/session-view.schema.ts` | 37 | Input schema for new `hivemind-session-view` tool |
| Enhanced session-tracker | `src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts` | 334 | Added child .json search, `filter-sessions` action, removed 50KB silent skip |
| Enhanced session-context | `src/tools/hivemind/session-context.ts` | 217 | Added `aggregate` action (status/subagentType histogram) |
| Enhanced session-hierarchy | `src/tools/hivemind/session-hierarchy.ts` | 159 | Added `get-manifest` action (reads hierarchy-manifest.json) |
| **New:** hivemind-session-view | `src/tools/hivemind/hivemind-session-view.ts` | 124 | **New tool** — cross-root unified query (3 roots via Promise.all) |
| Plugin registration | `src/plugin.ts` | Updated | Registered new tool (22→23 tools), updated startup message |
| Event-tracker cleanup | `.hivefiver-meta-builder/skills-lab/` (2 skill files) | Updated | 7 event-tracker references annotated with deprecation markers |
| Skill rewrite | `.hivefiver-meta-builder/skills-lab/hivemind-power-on/` (7 files) | 236+6 refs | Full rewrite removing aspirational content, truthful resume guidance |

### Session Tracker Tool Interface Signatures (Complete)

**`session-tracker`** — `src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts`
```
Actions: export-session, get-status, get-summary, list-sessions, search-sessions, filter-sessions

search-sessions(query, limit?, format?):
  → Queries child .json files (lastMessage, turn.content, journey[].content, delegatedBy.subagentType)
  → Removed MAX_SEARCH_CHUNK_BYTES (50KB skip), added >1MB warnings
  → Returns { totalMatches, sessions, hasMore, fileWarnings }

filter-sessions(status?, agentType?, minDepth?, maxDepth?, timeRange?, limit?):
  → Phase 1: Index-level filter via project-continuity.json (fast path)
  → Phase 2: Depth/agentType filter via individual session-continuity.json
  → Returns { totalCandidates, results[{sessionId, agentType, depth, status, lastMessage[:500], createdAt, updatedAt, toolSummary, childCount}], hasMore, filters }
```

**`session-hierarchy`** — `src/tools/hivemind/session-hierarchy.ts`
```
Actions: get-children, get-parent-chain, get-delegation-depth, get-manifest

get-manifest(sessionId):
  → Reads hierarchy-manifest.json via safeSessionPath
  → Returns { sessionId, childCount, children[{childSessionId, status, delegatedBy, depth, turnCount, createdAt}] }
```

**`session-context`** — `src/tools/hivemind/session-context.ts`
```
Actions: find-related, cross-reference, synthesize-context, aggregate

aggregate(groupBy: "subagentType" | "status"):
  → Status: fast path via project-continuity.json index
  → SubagentType: slow path via individual continuity files (sessionID prefix heuristic)
  → Returns { groupBy, totalSessions, counts, timestamp }
```

**`hivemind-session-view`** *(NEW)* — `src/tools/hivemind/hivemind-session-view.ts`
```
Actions: get

get(sessionId):
  → Read-through merge: Promise.all over 3 roots concurrently
  → Reads: session-tracker/{sessionId}/session-continuity.json + .hivemind/state/delegations.json + trajectory-ledger.json
  → Returns { session: {sessionId, status, turnCount, childCount, delegationDepth, parentSessionID, lastUpdated, toolSummary}, delegations: {total, active, entries}, trajectory: {total, entries} | null, queriedAt }
  → Per-root graceful fallback: null/[] on corrupt/missing files
```

### CQRS Boundaries Identified

| Principle | Implementation |
|-----------|---------------|
| **Tools = write-side (mutation)** | `delegate-task`, `delegation-status` handle mutations |
| **Tools = read-side (new actions)** | `filter-sessions`, `aggregate`, `get-manifest`, `hivemind-session-view` are **pure reads** — no mutation |
| **Hooks = read-side** | Existing convention verified: hooks must not write durable state (`cqrs-boundary.ts` enforces `assertHookWriteBoundary()`) |
| **No mutation in Phase 16 tools** | All new tools/actions are read-only — `hivemind-session-view` explicitly documented as "Read-only — no mutation authority" |
| **`hivemind-session-view` reads 3 roots** | Uses `safeSessionPath()` for `.hivemind/session-tracker/` (path traversal guard) and `resolve()` for `.hivemind/state/` files |

**4 functions removed from public API:** `analyzeCommandContract`, `renderCommandContext`, `transformCommandMessages`, `routeCommandPreview` — all internal routing helpers accessed through the dispatcher.

### Boundary Drift Assessment

**Current vs `last_mapped_commit`:** HEAD (`d0d5e966`) is 1 commit past `last_mapped_commit` (`906b21a0`). That single commit (`47e2717e`) already refreshed ALL 7 codebase maps. Post-cleanup manifest updates were documented as "real but small."

## 4. Cross-Phase Architecture Synthesis

### Tool Evolution Across All 3 Phases

```
Phase 16 (Build):                Phase 17 (Audit):          Phase 18 (Cleanup):
─────────────────────────────    ───────────────────────    ───────────────────────
session-tracker (+2 actions)     60 findings across        4 dead modules deleted
session-hierarchy (+1 action)     15 modules               storeCache extracted
session-context (+1 action)      7 RESEARCH.md fixes       barrel narrowed
hivemind-session-view (NEW)      No source changes         4 manifests synced
event-tracker remnants cleaned
hivemind-power-on skill rewritten
```

### Session Querying Data Flow (Complete)

```
Agent calls:
  └─ session-tracker({action: "search-sessions", query})
       └─ readdir → filter directories → read .md files
       └─ searchChildJsonFiles() → read session-continuity.json → iterate children → search 4 fields
       └─ Return matches with fileWarnings[] (if >1MB)

  └─ session-tracker({action: "filter-sessions", status, agentType, depth})
       └─ Phase 1: read project-continuity.json → index-level filter (fast)
       └─ Phase 2: read individual session-continuity.json → depth/agentType filter
       └─ Return rich metadata (up to limit, capped at 100)

  └─ session-context({action: "aggregate", groupBy})
       └─ status: read project-continuity.json only (fast path)
       └─ subagentType: read each session-continuity.json (slow path)

  └─ session-hierarchy({action: "get-manifest", sessionId})
       └─ safeSessionPath → readFile → JSON.parse(hierarchy-manifest.json)
       └─ Return flattened child list

  └─ hivemind-session-view({action: "get", sessionId})
       └─ Promise.all([
            readSessionData() → .hivemind/session-tracker/{id}/session-continuity.json
            readDelegationsForSession() → .hivemind/state/delegations.json
            readTrajectoryForSession() → .hivemind/state/trajectory-ledger.json
          ])
       └─ Merge into nested tree { session, delegations, trajectory }
```

### Notification/Communication Patterns

| Pattern | Where | Description |
|---------|-------|-------------|
| Tool action routing | All 5 tools | Single tool with `action` enum → `switch` → handler functions. Zod discriminatedUnion at schema boundary |
| Read-through merge | `hivemind-session-view` | `Promise.all` on 3 `readFile` calls, no materialized view |
| Index-first filtering | `filter-sessions` | Phase 1: read project-continuity.json index; Phase 2: read individual continuity files only on reduced candidate set |
| Per-root graceful fallback | `hivemind-session-view` | Null/empty fallback for each root independently — corrupt/missing files don't crash the whole query |
| In-memory cache (light) | `search-sessions` | Module-level `Map<string, { results, expiresAt }>` with TTL (agent's discretion, ~60s) |
| File size warning | `search-sessions` | >1MB files get `fileWarnings[]` instead of silent 50KB skip |
| Deprecation annotation | Skill files | "REMOVED in CP-ST-03" or "(event-tracker deprecated)" — preserves historical context while marking status |

### Sync Boundary Rules (established across Phases 17-18)

| Boundary | Rule | Source |
|----------|------|--------|
| **src/ = runtime code** | All implementation lives here | Phase 17 audit scope |
| **.opencode/ = soft meta-concepts** | Skills, agents, commands, rules — NOT state, NOT runtime code | Q6 + Phase 17 D-16 |
| **.hivemind/ = internal state root** | Session journals, lineage, continuity, delegation records | Q6 + Phase 16 D-10 |
| **.planning/ = governance only** | Requirements, architecture, audits — L5 docs only, no runtime authority | Planning AGENTS.md |
| **Sync manifest format** | Hybrid: JSON whitelist (sync-manifest.json) + .syncignore exclude patterns | Phase 17 D-15 |
| **Community repo receives** | Whitelisted dirs + `.github/workflows/` + cleaned src/ | Phase 17 D-17 |
| **.opencode/ packaged for distribution** | NOT synced as directory; primitives packaged via hivemind init CLI | Phase 17 D-16 |
